title: Node
description: Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

Position.description: Position of the node in global Cartesian 3D space. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Orientation.description: Local x, y, and z axes of the node as a vector Basis. Defaults to null which is interpretated to defaults when pushed to software and world axes in BHoM. Basis: An ordered set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors defining three-dimensional orientation in space

Support.description: Defines the Support property of the Node. If not set, the Node will be assumed to be free to translate and rotate. Constraint6DOF: Constraint objects with six degrees of freedom, three translational and three rotational, used for supports and bar end releases.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
